Our shake on things…
Discover Voicebox, a luxury 90s-inspired cocktail lounge with neon accents, craft cocktails, and live music. Designed for intimate conversation and connection, it’s the perfect spot to unwind in style, whether for date night or drinks with friends.

--- Page: /about ---
About — Voicebox
0
Who we are
Voicebox exists to cultivate and curate a space where connection, joy, and comfort coexist. We are a luxury cocktail bar specializing in custom syrups and complex, appealing cocktails, all served in an environment that combines upscale style with a warm, community feel. This is your sleek home away from home, complete with knowledgeable and inventive mixologists sure to leave you enamored with their creations.
Founded by Jaclyn Barber and Joshua Barber, who bring over a decade of combined bartending and management experience, Voicebox reflects their deep industry expertise in every detail. From the sophisticated cocktail and light bites menu to the décor, vibe, and overall style of the space, they have poured their hard-earned knowledge into making each visit a night to remember.
Contact us
Private Event?
Fill out some info and we will be in touch shortly. We can’t wait to hear from you!
